title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University uses AI tools including AlphaFold and AlphaGenome to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development in Uganda. By analyzing protein expression patterns and screening 15,000 potential binding sites, they narrowed viable targets to 15 candidates for laboratory validation using only a laptop and server.
